items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: from Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道 Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司将 AI 从代码生成延伸到 PRD 校验、design review、code review 等软件生命周期早期阶段，形成「AI 治理层」。这是行业实践综述而非具体产品发布，没有 SDK/API 字段变化，但提示团队应在 PRD/design 阶段引入 AI 评审。
items.backend_focus: 建议在内部研发流程中试点接入 LLM 做 PRD 校验与 design doc 评审（可通过现有 Chat Completions API + structured outputs），不需引入新依赖；关注 Cloudflare/Uber 是否开源对应 prompt 模板与评估集。

items.title: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents
items.original_summary: Vercel has released Eve, an open-source framework for building, deploying, and operating AI agents in production. The framework uses a filesystem-based project structure to organize agent instructions, tools, skills, subagents, communication channels, and scheduled tasks, enabling developers to define agent behavior while reducing the amount of supporting infrastructure they need to implement. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Vercel 开源发布 Eve 框架，用于构建、部署和运维生产级 AI agent。项目结构基于文件系统组织 agent 指令、工具、技能、子 agent、通信通道与定时任务。区别于 Vercel AI SDK 的纯函数式调用，Eve 引入 subagent / scheduled tasks / channel 等新原语，属于框架层而非模型 API 层的更新。
items.backend_focus: 评估在现有 AI agent 项目中试用 Eve（npx create-eve-app 或 pnpm create），重点替换自研的 subagent 调度与定时任务逻辑；与 Vercel AI SDK 共存而非替代，关注其 tool/skill schema 是否兼容现有 Anthropic/OpenAI tool use 定义。

items.title: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows
items.original_summary: Diagrid has announced the release of Dapr 1.18, introducing what it calls Verifiable Execution, a new set of capabilities designed to bring cryptographic trust, provenance, and tamper-evident execution records to distributed applications and AI agents. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Dapr 发布 1.18 版本，新增 Verifiable Execution 能力，为分布式应用与 AI agent 提供加密可信的执行追溯与防篡改记录。区别于此前版本仅做工作流编排，新增了 cryptographic provenance 能力。属于平台运行时层升级，对 LLM API 调用方透明，但需要升级 Dapr 运行时与 sidecar。
items.backend_focus: 升级路径：把 Dapr control plane 与 sidecar 从 1.17 升到 1.18，在 workflow spec 中启用 verifiableExecution 配置项；若自研 AI agent 工作流需要审计追溯，集成新 SDK API（dapr.WorkflowWithVerification）替换旧的 Workflow 调用。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft Build 2026 宣布 Azure Kubernetes Service 全面增强，新增 Bare Metal 节点、Fleet 多集群管理与 AI 训练/推理基础设施支持。AKS 节点池调度、GPU/Bare Metal 节点 SKU、Fleet API 都是新增维度，相对此前主要依赖 VMSS 的 AKS 是平台层重大升级。对运行 AI 训练/推理集群的团队有直接影响。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：评估 az aks create --node-vm-size / 新 Bare Metal SKU 与 Fleet management API（az fleet member / az fleet update-strategy），把现有 AI 推理部署从单集群迁移到 Fleet 多集群；关注 GPU/Bare Metal 节点在目标 region 的 GA 时间与定价再决策。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 设备上完全本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，可加载自定义 PyTorch 转换模型或预优化开源模型。区别于 Core ML 主要做推理，Core AI 新增了 generative LLM 与 on-device 大模型能力。属于 SDK 层更新，Xcode/iOS 工程需迁移。
items.backend_focus: 迁移路径：在 Xcode 中引入 Core AI SDK（替换 Core ML 引用），使用 AICModelLoader 加载 PyTorch 转 .aiml 格式的模型；关注 supportedModels 列表与 max context window 限制，对现有 on-device 推理代码做 adapter 改造，并复测内存/性能基线。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 推出 Chunk Sidecars 功能，把 CI 校验直接嵌入 AI 编码 agent 的内层开发循环。区别于传统 CI 只在 push/PR 阶段触发，Chunk Sidecars 让 agent 在生成代码时同步获得 lint/test/typecheck 反馈。属于 CI 平台与 AI agent 协作层的能力新增。
items.backend_focus: 在 CircleCI config.yml 中启用 chunk_sidecars 插件并配置对应 orb；CI 脚本需暴露快速 lint/test 命令供 sidecar 调用；若自研 AI coding agent 框架，需适配 sidecar 回调事件格式才能接入。预计需升级 circleci CLI 至最新版本。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How It Happens and How to Detect It
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 长文综述机器学习数据投毒（label flipping、backdoor、clean-label、gradient manipulation）的攻击手法与防御实践。这是安全知识科普文章，不涉及新 SDK、API 字段或模型版本发布，但对训练自有/微调模型的团队具有工程参考价值。
items.backend_focus: 建议审计训练数据 pipeline：增加 label 分布异常检测、对第三方数据集做 backdoor probe、使用梯度监控工具（如 Activation Atlas）识别异常 sample；目前不需改任何 LLM API 集成代码，但应建立数据来源白名单与 provenance 记录。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: a Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 实践指南：在云环境中治理 AI（发现 shadow AI、数据分类、IAM 强制、policy-as-code、运营控制），把治理嵌入交付流水线。属于方法论文章，不涉及具体 SDK、API 字段或模型变化，但对在多云环境调用 LLM 的合规有指导意义。
items.backend_focus: 建议盘点内部 LLM API 调用清单（OpenAI/Anthropic/自建），通过 CASB 或云配置审计发现 shadow AI；在 CI pipeline 接入 OPA/Conftest 做 policy-as-code 校验（如禁用 GPT-5.x 之外的模型、强制 data classification tag）。不需升级 SDK。

items.title: AWS Previews FinOps Agent for Cost Analysis and Optimization
items.original_summary: Amazon has released AWS FinOps Agent in public preview, a managed service that automates several common FinOps workflows. The agent can investigate cost anomalies, correlate spend changes with AWS activity data, and integrate with tools such as Slack and Jira to route findings to resource owners. By Renato Losio
items.chinese_summary: AWS 发布 FinOps Agent 公开预览版，托管服务自动化成本异常调查、与 AWS 活动数据关联分析，并集成 Slack/Jira 路由到资源 owner。区别于 AWS Cost Explorer 的手动分析，FinOps Agent 引入 agentic 工作流主动诊断。属于 AWS 生态新服务，不涉及 LLM API 接口变化。
items.backend_focus: 在 AWS 控制台启用 FinOps Agent preview 并授权 Cost Explorer + CloudWatch + Slack/Jira 权限；在现有 FinOps 流程中测试其异常检测告警是否覆盖 AI workload 的 token 计费与 GPU 节点成本；关注 preview 期间定价模型与正式 GA 时间线。
